expo.name: Palate
expo.description: Start to see how you actually eat. A weekly identity read of your real eating life — plus a habit-based profile and feed.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Palate uses your location only when the app is open, to detect which restaurant or café you may be eating at. We never share or sell your location.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: We send a single notification on Sunday morning when your weekly Wrapped is ready. You can turn this off in Settings.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Palate uses your photos only when you choose a profile picture.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Palate uses your camera only when you take a photo of a meal.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Palate uses your location to detect when you may be at a restaurant. You can disable this anytime in Settings.
